tracks.meaning: to give money to someone in exchange for goods, services, or as a debt obligation
to settle or discharge a financial debt or obligation
to provide sufficient or acceptable compensation or reward for something
to suffer consequences or face punishment for an action or offense
to endure a penalty, fine, or cost as a consequence of behavior
to allow a sailing vessel to turn away from the wind or change course
to extract or work toward obtaining minerals or resources from the earth
to be worthwhile or beneficial in terms of effort or investment
